title: Package v3.0 runtime proof into release definition and sign-off artifacts
description: Turn the proven TASK-011 loop into a release-grade v3.0 definition, checklist, release notes, and verification evidence without overstating autonomy or backend coverage.
triage_notes: Release definition, checklist, and release notes were packaged for v3.0. Smoke passed with warning-level drift follow-up captured explicitly, and follow-up runtime reliability work was opened as TASK-028.
